item.description: Internal/Other Changes - Updated bundled Claude CLI to version 2.1.119

item.title: RT @dmwlff: After 2.1.117, you may notice that Claude doesn't call its Grep or Glob Tool anymore. YES!!! It only took four months. It's fa…
item.description: RT @dmwlff: After 2.1.117, you may notice that Claude doesn't call its Grep or Glob Tool anymore. YES!!! It only took four months. It's fa…

item.title: chore: Update CHANGELOG.md
Claude Code v2.1.120 Crashes on Startup
item.description: [minor] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated error rates on Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: [minor] resolved — The issue affecting requests to Claude Opus 4.7 has been resolved. Impact occurred from 01:24–01:59 UTC.

item.title: chore: Update CHANGELOG.md
sdk: v0.91.1
item.description: 0.91.1 (2026-04-24) Full Changelog: sdk-v0.91.0...sdk-v0.91.1 Bug Fixes memory: use restrictive file mode for memory files (901) (6db3b7e) Chores formatter: run prettier and eslint separately (974d22f)

item.title: We’ve refreshed Claude Code on the web and mobile. A few things that recently shipped 🧵 https://t.co/hJHIckTxx3
item.description: We’ve refreshed Claude Code on the web and mobile. A few things that recently shipped 🧵 https://t.co/hJHIckTxx3

item.title:
New Anthropic research: Project Deal.
We created a marketplace for employees in our San Francisco office, with one big twist. We tasked Claude with buying, selling and negotiating on our colleagues’
item.description:
New Anthropic research: Project Deal.
We created a marketplace for employees in our San Francisco office, with one big twist. We tasked Claude with buying, selling and negotiating on our colleagues’ behalf. https://t.co/H2f6cLDlAW

item.title:
Trigger Routines whenever a GitHub Issue is created. Great for auto-triage usecases.
Get started at https://t.co/QIDgEAJrRG https://t.co/50kGEYOSQ7
item.description:
Trigger Routines whenever a GitHub Issue is created. Great for auto-triage usecases.
Get started at https://t.co/QIDgEAJrRG https://t.co/50kGEYOSQ7

item.title: Issues with sign-ups on platform.claude.com
item.description: [major] resolved — This incident has been resolved.

item.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.7
item.description: [minor] resolved — The incident has been resolved. We had 3 blips of unavailability: * 2:53 PT / 9:53 UTC -- 2:57 PT / 9:57 UTC * 3:01 PT / 10:01 UTC -- 3:06 PT / 10:06 UTC * 3:34 PT / 10:34 UTC -- 3:36 PT / 10:36 UTC

item.title: An update on our election safeguards
RT @ClaudeDevs: Over the past month, some of you reported Claude Code's quality had slipped. We investigated, and published a post-mortem o…
item.description: RT @ClaudeDevs: Over the past month, some of you reported Claude Code's quality had slipped. We investigated, and published a post-mortem o…

item.title:
You can now /schedule one-time tasks from the CLI or the Routines UI via the Schedule -> Once Trigger.
Use it to: * /schedule cleanup this feature flag in 1 week */schedule give me a launch repor
item.description:
You can now /schedule one-time tasks from the CLI or the Routines UI via the Schedule -> Once Trigger.
Use it to: * /schedule cleanup this feature flag in 1 week */schedule give me a launch report for my feature in 2 days https://t.co/tiC288hMc7

item.title: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
item.description: We traced recent reports of Claude Code quality issues to three separate changes. Here's what happened and what we're changing.

item.title: Anthropic and Amazon expand collaboration for up to 5 gigawatts of new compute
Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands
item.description: Harnesses encode assumptions that go stale as models improve. Managed Agents—our hosted service for long-horizon agent work—is built around interfaces that stay stable as harnesses change.

item.title: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals
item.description: Infrastructure configuration can swing agentic coding benchmarks by several percentage points—sometimes more than the leaderboard gap between top models.
